title: Cobblemon Mythical Dungeon
description: Custom Modpack for the Cobblemon Mythical Dungeon Minecraft Server!
body:
# **Cobblemon Mythical Dungeon Modpack**

![Cobblemon Mythical Dungeon Titlecard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f6a0b0f85d09120ecee128011d40d5f66387665.png)

Step into the world of **Cobblemon Mythical Dungeon**, a server where the Mystery Dungeon series is reimagined inside Minecraft!

This modpack contains all the required mods for players joining the **Cobblemon Mythical Dungeon Server**, with a mix of performance and content while integrating our custom features like quests, NPCs and our own Personality Quiz.

## Here's a rundown of the additions our Modpack brings:


<details>
<summary>🗺️ Exploration</summary>
The modpack includes mods that incentivize exploration by adding new biomes and new items while also helping with better inventory management and balancing the loot players can find in multiplayer. You will find mods like:

- Terralith
- Traveler's Backpacks
- Artifacts
- Lootr
- Serene Seasons
- Xaero's Worldmap & Minimap

</details>

<details>
<summary>🏗️ Building</summary>
While not on an adventure, decorate your base thanks to a selection of mods that add building blocks, furniture and decorations, but also some of them to make the world itself look prettier:

- Chipped
- Beautify
- Lucky's Cozy Home
- LambDynamicLights
- 3D SkinLayers

</details>



<details>
<summary>⚙️ QoL</summary>
A selection of QoL & Performance additions are also shipped for your client; they bring a boost in your game's performance or simply tweak it conveniently to give you more info and personalization:


- Lithium & Sodium
- JEI
- Jade
- Inventory Profiles Next
- Cobblemon Integrations


</details>



<details>
<summary>🪨 Cobblemon Add-Ons</summary>

And finally you will find Cobblemon side mods to enrich your Pokémon experience like the CMD Client, our personal custom mods with all PMD additions to the server, but also:

- Cobblemon MegaShowdown
- Cobblemon Alpha Project
- Cobblemon Raid Dens
- Cobblemon Research Tasks
- SimpleTMs

</details>



<details>
<summary>🪪 Credits</summary>

All the portraits and sprites used in the Cobblemon Mythical Dungeon, cmdclient or any other form of CMD content are taken from the [PMD Sprite Repository](https://sprites.pmdcollab.org/).


All the credits to the artists can be found [here](https://github.com/sh4k0x/PMD-Sprite-Repository-Credits)

</details>





**ATTENTION**: Singleplayer support for the Mystery Dungeon features **is not implemented _yet_**, and all the features are currently **exclusive to the official Cobblemon Mythical Dungeon Server**.
We will explore singleplayer compatibility in the future, but for now all custom content works only within the CMD environment.
